g.text: Modular 7" platform · 20' W × 12' D (center) · curved upstage edge offset 12" from LED wall
Designed for Nathaniel Lehrer · Video Team
PLAN VIEW — TOP DOWN · AUDIENCE BELOW · SCALE 1'-0" = 60px (1:24)
CURVED LED WALL · 21'-9½" chord · 5° per cabinet · 6 cabinets tall (118")
* Row 3 panels have curved upstage edges — see PANEL SCHEMATIC below
RGB+W DMX LED STRIP — 20' continuous, in aluminum channel, frosted diffuser, points outward + down
↑ Stage upstage edge — arc R ≈ 217.85" (concentric w/ LED wall) ↑
FRONT ELEVATION — AUDIENCE VIEW · H × 6 EXAGGERATED FOR LEGIBILITY
MATTE BLACK FASCIA (1/2" MDF or birch ply, painted) — 5 sections × 4' wide
RGB+W DMX LED STRIP in aluminum channel, frosted diffuser — wraps full 20' downstage face, glow points outward + down
Red panels = removable fascia ports (≈4" tall × 8" wide cutouts with magnet catch) — pop out to access cable tunnel
(joist spacing on either side accommodates this)
Cut looking SR → SL · Downstage on right →
DECK STACK (top down): Masonite ¼" + CDX plywood ¾" + 2x6 frame 5½" + leveler ½" min = 7" total
Cable tunnel runs front → back through each column (5 channels total)
• 10 panels are standard 4'×4' rectangles. 5 upstage panels (red) get curved cuts on their upstage edge.
• Panels bolt edge-to-edge with ⅜" carriage bolts + wing nuts (4 per joint). Dowel pins for alignment.
• Each panel has 4 corner levelers (16 total per panel × 15 panels = 60 levelers).
• Perimeter rails on adjacent panels have aligned 6"W × 4"H notches → forms continuous cable tunnel.
MATERIALS & HARDWARE — TOP-LEVEL SUMMARY (full BOM in construction plan)
• 2x6 × 4' offcuts for blocking and cable-port headers
• 4'×8' × ¾" CDX plywood — deck — qty: 8 sheets (cut to 4'×4')
• 4'×8' × ¼" tempered Masonite — top skin — qty: 8 sheets
• 4'×8' × ½" MDF or birch ply — fascia — qty: 3 sheets
• 1 gal matte black acrylic stage paint (Behr Ultra Pure Black, eggshell or matte)
• ⅜" × 4" carriage bolts + wing nuts + washers — qty: ~180 (panel joints)
• Stage leveler feet (½"–1½" adj, ¾" stud) — qty: 60
• Neodymium magnet catches (5 lb hold) — qty: 10 (fascia ports)
• RGB+W LED strip, 24V, IP65, 60 LED/m — qty: 7m (~22')
• Aluminum mounting channel w/ frosted diffuser — qty: 7m
• 5-pin DMX cable to lighting board (run inside cable tunnel)
• Non-slip rubber pads under each leveler foot
• Edge-glow safety tape (subtle, under downstage lip)
• Anti-slip clear coat on Masonite top (optional)
PLAN VIEW SCALE 1:24 · ELEVATION HEIGHT EXAGGERATED 6× · DETAIL SECTION 1:12 · ALL DIMENSIONS NOMINAL — VERIFY ON SITE BEFORE CUTTING
